summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now picks up chapter 1's promise to look into the footnote sooner or later, and the closing line now more clearly bridges into chapter 3's delayed climb back to the hidden route.
edits: Added an opening line that links the chapter 1 ending to Gavin's immediate search the next afternoon.
Adjusted the final sentence to stress Gavin memorizing the route before he is physically able to climb back.
